page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9ae.large is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical cores, indicating a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio with no hyperthreading. The processing power is delivered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at a base clock speed of 2.25 GHz.

The instance is equipped with 4.0 GB of system memory, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external block storage volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps. The instance does not include any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Due to the lack of local storage and a relatively low memory-to-vCPU ratio of 1:2, this instance is tailored for workloads that prioritize dedicated CPU execution over memory capacity or local disk performance. It is suitable for lightweight compute-focused tasks, microservices, web serving, and basic utility workloads that do not require high-performance cryptography or advanced vector extensions.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9ae.large is an x86_64 compute-optimized virtual server instance utilizing the KVM hypervisor. It is configured with 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 2 physical AMD EPYC 9T95 cores running at 2.25 GHz, offering a dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading. The instance features 4.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a 2.0 GB per core ratio. It does not include local storage or integrated graphics processing units, relying instead on network-attached storage and external networking with a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Lacking advanced vector extensions and cryptographic hardware acceleration flags, this instance is designed for entry-level compute tasks, lightweight web serving, and microservices that require dedicated CPU resources but have modest memory and storage demands.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9ae.large is an x86_64 compute-optimized instance with 2 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 4.0 GB of RAM, 2 Gbps network bandwidth, and no local storage, designed for lightweight dedicated compute workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c9ae.large is a compute-optimized instance featuring 2 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 4.0 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated dual-core AMD EPYC virtual server with a compute-focused memory ratio and baseline network connectivity for lightweight workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a dedicated 2-core AMD EPYC 9T95 processor at 2.25 GHz
Equipped with 4.0 GB of RAM, providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-memory ratio
Requires external block storage as no local storage is bundled
Delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps
Best suited for lightweight compute tasks, microservices, and web serving
